account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage profile details, authentication preferences, and password security from one place.
account.profileDescription: Update how your identity appears across AtlasClaw surfaces and notifications.
account.workspaceDescription: Quick access to sign-in and workspace-level account details.
account.securityDescription: Rotate your password regularly if this account uses local sign-in.
account.identityDescription: Manage your public and private workspace profile data.
account.preferencesDescription: Store local workspace preferences for experiments and digest notifications.
account.providerTokensDescription: Set personal tokens for provider instances that support user-owned user_token.
account.providerTokensLoadingDescription: Checking provider instances that allow personal user tokens.
account.providerTokensEmptyDescription: No provider instances currently allow user-owned user_token configuration.
account.providerTokenModalDescription: Set the personal token AtlasClaw should use for this provider instance.
account.profileBio: This workspace profile controls how your identity appears in notifications, approvals, and administrative activity across AtlasClaw.
account.profileBioAdmin: This workspace profile oversees administrative access, approval identity, and visibility across AtlasClaw operations.
account.profileHint: Changes apply immediately to your profile in the workspace shell.
account.passwordHint: Use a new password that you are not using elsewhere.
account.passwordModalDescription: Confirm your current password and choose a new one for local sign-in.
account.passwordMismatch: New password confirmation does not match
account.passwordUnavailableDescription: This account uses federated sign-in. Update your password through the external identity provider instead.
account.securityPanelDescription: Control local sign-in conveniences and password rotation for this account.
account.notificationInfo: Notification preferences are stored locally in this preview and apply after saving.
account.dangerDescription: Once you deactivate your account, access is revoked until an administrator restores it.
account.deactivateUnavailable: Self-service account deactivation is not available yet. Please contact an administrator.

roles.title: Role Management
roles.description: Design reusable permission bundles for channels, users, tokens, and skills from one editor.
roles.deleteDescription: This role will be removed permanently if it is no longer assigned to any user.
roles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
roles.roleDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe when this role should be assigned.
roles.defaultRoleDescription: Permission bundle for workspace access control.

skillPermissions.manageDescription: Manage which skills this role can enable and use.
skillPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit the skill permission model, including which roles may configure and enable skills.

providerPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit which registered provider instances this role may access at runtime.

userPermissions.viewDescription: Browse users, status, and the roles currently assigned to them.
userPermissions.createDescription: Invite or create new users directly from the admin workspace.
userPermissions.editDescription: Change profiles, assigned roles, and authentication options.
userPermissions.deleteDescription: Remove user accounts that no longer need workspace access.
userPermissions.assignRolesDescription: Assign roles to users or revoke roles they currently hold.
userPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit the user permission model without directly granting those permissions.

channelPermissions.viewDescription: Review connected channels, owners, and health status.
channelPermissions.createDescription: Create new channel connections for supported platforms.
channelPermissions.editDescription: Update credentials, callback URLs, and runtime settings.
channelPermissions.deleteDescription: Remove obsolete or compromised channel connections.
channelPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit the channel permission model without directly operating channel instances.

tokenPermissions.viewDescription: Inspect token names, providers, and current health status.
tokenPermissions.createDescription: Register new provider endpoints or API key entries.
tokenPermissions.editDescription: Rotate API keys and update model routing metadata.
tokenPermissions.deleteDescription: Retire tokens that should no longer be used by the workspace.
tokenPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit the token permission model without directly maintaining token records.

agentConfigPermissions.viewDescription: Inspect reusable agent templates, persona blocks, and activation status.
agentConfigPermissions.createDescription: Create new agent templates for assistants and workflow specialists.
agentConfigPermissions.editDescription: Update agent identity, memory presets, and runtime defaults.
agentConfigPermissions.deleteDescription: Remove agent templates that should no longer be available.
agentConfigPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit the agent-template permission model without directly operating agent records.

providerConfigPermissions.viewDescription: Inspect registered provider instances, ownership, and active status.
providerConfigPermissions.createDescription: Register new provider instances with baseline connection settings.
providerConfigPermissions.editDescription: Update provider credentials, instance metadata, and runtime options.
providerConfigPermissions.deleteDescription: Remove provider instances that should no longer be available.
providerConfigPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit the provider-instance permission model without directly operating provider records.

modelConfigPermissions.viewDescription: Inspect model catalog entries, provider bindings, and routing defaults.
modelConfigPermissions.createDescription: Register new model definitions for supported providers.
modelConfigPermissions.editDescription: Adjust model metadata, routing behavior, and capability settings.
modelConfigPermissions.deleteDescription: Retire model definitions that should no longer be selectable.
modelConfigPermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit the model-configuration permission model without directly operating model records.

rolePermissions.viewDescription: Inspect existing roles, summaries, and saved permission sets.
rolePermissions.createDescription: Create new custom roles for teams and projects.
rolePermissions.editDescription: Adjust permission bundles and module defaults.
rolePermissions.deleteDescription: Retire roles that are no longer assigned anywhere.
rolePermissions.managePermissionsDescription: Edit permission models and role governance boundaries across modules.

modules.skillsDescription: Manage which skills this role can enable and use.
modules.providersDescription: Manage which registered provider instances this role can access at runtime.
modules.channelsDescription: Manage access to connection configuration and lifecycle actions.
modules.tokensDescription: Control visibility and maintenance rights for provider credentials.
modules.agentConfigsDescription: Manage reusable agent definitions, persona blocks, and runtime defaults.
modules.providerConfigsDescription: Manage service provider instances and their configuration lifecycle.
modules.modelConfigsDescription: Control model catalog visibility and maintenance rights.
modules.usersDescription: Define how this role may browse and administer workspace users.
modules.rolesDescription: Set whether this role can create, edit, and retire other roles.

admin.name: Administrator
admin.description: Full administrative access to manage workspace configuration and access control.

user.name: Standard User
user.description: Default collaborator role with access to enabled workspace skills.

viewer.name: Viewer
viewer.description: Read-only role for audit and oversight workflows.

approval-create.name: Create Approval
approval-create.description: Create a DingTalk approval instance for reimbursement, leave, purchase, and similar requests.

approval-query.name: Approval Query
approval-query.description: Query approval instance status and details.

approval-todo.name: Approval To-do
approval-todo.description: Check the current user's pending approval task count.

jira-issue.name: Jira Issue
jira-issue.description: Create, query, update, and delete Jira issues.

approval.name: Approval Management
approval.description: SmartCMP approval management for viewing pending approvals, approving requests, and rejecting requests.

datasource.name: Reference Data
datasource.description: Query SmartCMP reference data such as catalogs, business groups, resource pools, and applications.

preapproval-agent.name: Pre-approval Agent
preapproval-agent.description: Prepare, validate, and pre-check approval requests before formal submission.

request.name: Request
request.description: SmartCMP resource provisioning and ticket requests. Create VMs, provision cloud resources, deploy applications, or submit work orders from one workflow.

request-decomposition-agent.name: Request Decomposition Agent
request-decomposition-agent.description: Transform descriptive infrastructure demands into structured CMP requests and draft sub-requests.

create-provider.name: Create Provider
create-provider.description: Create new AtlasClaw providers for APIs, ITSM, CRM, or custom service integrations.

create-atlasclaw-skill.name: Create AtlasClaw Skill
create-atlasclaw-skill.description: Create new AtlasClaw skills for executable tools, markdown skills, or provider-backed skills.

roles.skillsListDescription: Search the live skill catalog and decide which skills this role can enable.
roles.skillBehaviorDescription: Use the master switch to enable or disable all visible skills below at once.
roles.defaultSkillDescription: Workspace skill available to AtlasClaw agents.
roles.providersListDescription: Search registered provider instances and decide which ones this role can use.
roles.providerBehaviorDescription: Provider instances are allowed unless this role explicitly turns access off.
roles.noRolesDescription: Try a different search term or create a new custom role.
roles.noSkillsDescription: Adjust the search term to review more skills.
roles.noProvidersDescription: Adjust the search term or register provider instances first.
roles.emptyDescription: Choose a built-in role or create a new one to edit the right-side permission designer.
roles.validationRequired: Role name and identifier are required.
roles.loadFailed: Failed to load role management data

login.title: AtlasClaw Login
login.subtitle: Login to your account to continue
login.emptyFields: Username and password cannot be empty

chat.introMessage:
Hello! I'm AtlasClaw AI Assistant.

AtlasClaw is an enterprise agent framework that lets you interact with multiple enterprise systems through natural language, without switching between different consoles.

I can help you:
- Trigger cross-system workflows
- Query operational data
- Complete cross-system tasks
- Manage tickets and approval processes

Try saying: "Query my pending tickets" or "Help me create a VM on Hushan Cloud"

dialog.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to proceed?

channel.title: Channel Management

agentid.title: Agent ID
agentid.description: Application Agent ID (required with Corp ID)

bot_id.title: Bot ID
bot_id.description: Intelligent robot Bot ID (for WebSocket long connection)

bot_secret.title: Bot Secret
bot_secret.description: Intelligent robot secret (required with Bot ID)

provider_type.title: Integration Method
provider_type.description: Choose which integration configuration this channel should use.

provider_binding.title: Integration Instance
provider_binding.description: Choose one configured integration instance under the selected integration method.

channel.selectToConfig: Select a channel type to configure
channel.noConnections: No connections yet. Click the button above to create one.
channel.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this connection? This action cannot be undone.
channel.validationTimeout: Validation timed out. Please check network reachability and try again.
channel.requiredFieldsMissing: Please fill in all required fields
channel.saveFirst: Please save the connection before verifying

oneOfHint.client_id_or_webhook_url: Fill in AppKey OR Webhook URL (choose one)
oneOfHint.bot_id_or_webhook_url_or_corpid: Fill in Bot ID, Webhook URL, or Corp ID (choose one)

channel.ecosystemDesc: Integrate and manage your AI agent deployment endpoints across various enterprise platforms.
channel.showingConnections: Showing {{current}} of {{total}} active connections for {{type}} type
channel.channelConnectionDesc: Configure how your AI agents communicate with external platforms. Ensure credentials match your provider's developer console.
channel.primaryStatusDesc: Marking this as the Default will route all outgoing agent notifications through this channel unless otherwise specified in agent settings.
channel.securityTip1: Rotate your App Secret every 90 days.
channel.securityTip2: Always use the 'Validate Connection' tool before saving changes to production.
channel.securityTip3: Ensure your callback URL is restricted to the Atlas IP range.
channel.plannedChannelNotice: This integration entry is reserved for upcoming native support.
channel.plannedConnectionsEmpty: This integration is not available yet.
channel.cardDescription_feishu: Enterprise app and bot messaging entry point for internal notifications and collaboration.
channel.cardDescription_dingtalk: Supports Stream and bot callback flows for internal alerts and automation.
channel.cardDescription_wecom: Covers group bot, application messaging, and WebSocket long-connection scenarios.
channel.cardDescription_websocket: Provides a bidirectional real-time session channel for dashboards and custom clients.
channel.cardDescription_rest: Standard HTTP API entry point for service integrations and task triggers.
channel.cardDescription_sse: One-way real-time event delivery channel for browsers and streaming clients.
channel.cardDescription_slack: Reserved collaboration integration entry. Native connection support will be added later.
channel.cardDescription_discord: Reserved community bot integration entry. Native connection support will be added later.
channel.cardDescription_generic: Manage this channel access configuration and connection state through Atlas.
channel.integrationConfigDesc: Select integration services to enable for this connection
